member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.EdmxLoader

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.EdmxLoader.OnModelCreatingMethod
member.summary: Gets or sets the complete OnModelCreating method extracted from EasyAF extensions.
member.value: The complete C# OnModelCreating method including signature and braces as a string. Returns an empty string if no OnModelCreating method is found in the EDMX file.
member.remarks: This property contains the OnModelCreating method stored in the EasyAF Extensions section of the EDMX Designer metadata. The method can be used for code generation or documentation purposes.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.EdmxLoader.SsdlElement
member.summary: Gets or sets the SSDL (Store Schema Definition Language) XML element.

member.summary: Gets or sets the store item collection containing storage model metadata.

member.summary: Gets or sets the storage mapping item collection containing C-S mapping metadata.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Accessibility
member.summary: Responsible for encapsulating the retrieval and translation of the CodeGeneration annotations in the EntityFramework Metadata to a form that is useful in code generation.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Accessibility.ForType(System.Data.Entity.Core.Metadata.Edm.GlobalItem)
member.summary:
Gets the accessibility that should be applied to a type being generated from the provided GlobalItem.
defaults to public if no annotation is found.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Accessibility.ForProperty(System.Data.Entity.Core.Metadata.Edm.EdmMember)
member.summary:
Gets the accessibility that should be applied at the property level for a property being generated from the provided EdmMember.
defaults to public if no annotation is found.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Accessibility.ForNavigationProperty(System.Data.Entity.Core.Metadata.Edm.NavigationProperty)
member.summary:
Gets the accessibility that should be applied to a NavigationProperty being generated
Looks up the accessibility for the property (as defined by its getterAccess and setterAccess) and compares to the accessibility for the target type (as defined by its typeAccess) and takes the minimum

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Accessibility.ForReadOnlyProperty(System.Data.Entity.Core.Metadata.Edm.EdmMember)
member.summary:
Gets the accessibility that should be applied at the property level for a Read-Only property being generated from the provided EdmMember.
defaults to public if no annotation is found.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Accessibility.ForReadOnlyProperty(System.Data.Entity.Core.Metadata.Edm.EntitySet)
member.summary:
Gets the accessibility that should be applied at the property level for a property being generated from the provided EntitySet.
defaults to public if no annotation is found.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Accessibility.ForWriteOnlyProperty(System.Data.Entity.Core.Metadata.Edm.EdmMember)
member.summary:
Gets the accessibility that should be applied at the property level for a Write-Only property being generated from the provided EdmMember.
defaults to public if no annotation is found.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Accessibility.ForGetter(System.Data.Entity.Core.Metadata.Edm.EdmMember)
member.summary:
Gets the accessibility that should be applied at the get level for a property being generated from the provided EdmMember.
defaults to empty if no annotation is found or the accessibility is the same as the property level.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Accessibility.ForSetter(System.Data.Entity.Core.Metadata.Edm.EdmMember)
member.summary:
Gets the accessibility that should be applied at the set level for a property being generated from the provided EdmMember.
defaults to empty if no annotation is found or the accessibility is the same as the property level.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Accessibility.ForMethod(System.Data.Entity.Core.Metadata.Edm.EdmFunction)
member.summary:
Gets the accessibility that should be applied to a method being generated from the provided EdmFunction.
defaults to public if no annotation is found.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.CodeGenerationTools
member.summary: Responsible for helping to create source code that is correctly formatted and functional

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.CodeGenerationTools.FullyQualifySystemTypes
member.summary:
When true, all types that are not being generated are fully qualified to keep them from conflicting with types that are being generated. Useful when you have something like a type being generated named System.
Default is false.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.CodeGenerationTools.CamelCaseFields
member.summary:
When true, the field names are Camel Cased, otherwise they will preserve the case they start with.
Default is true.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.CodeGenerationTools.#cctor
member.summary: Initializes a new CodeGenerationTools object with the TextTransformation (T4 generated class) that is currently running

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.CodeGenerationTools.CamelCase(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the passed in identifier with the first letter changed to lowercase.

member.summary: Gets the entity, complex, or enum types for which code should be generated from the given item collection. Any types for which an ExternalTypeName annotation has been applied in the conceptual model metadata (CSDL) are filtered out of the returned list.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.CodeGenerationTools.GetTypeName(System.Data.Entity.Core.Metadata.Edm.TypeUsage)
member.summary: Returns the escaped type name to use for the given usage of a c-space type in o-space. This might be an external type name if the ExternalTypeName annotation has been specified in the conceptual model metadata (CSDL).
member.param: The c-space type usage to get a name for.
member.returns: The type name to use.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.CodeGenerationTools.GetTypeName(System.Data.Entity.Core.Metadata.Edm.EdmType)
member.summary: Returns the escaped type name to use for the given c-space type in o-space. This might be an external type name if the ExternalTypeName annotation has been specified in the conceptual model metadata (CSDL).
member.param: The c-space type to get a name for.
member.returns: The type name to use.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.CodeGenerationTools.GetTypeName(System.Data.Entity.Core.Metadata.Edm.TypeUsage,System.String)
member.summary: Returns the escaped type name to use for the given usage of an c-space type in o-space. This might be an external type name if the ExternalTypeName annotation has been specified in the conceptual model metadata (CSDL).
member.param: The c-space type usage to get a name for.
If not null and the type's namespace does not match this namespace, then a fully qualified name will be returned.
member.returns: The type name to use.

member.param: The c-space type to get a name for.
If not null and the type's namespace does not match this namespace, then a fully qualified name will be returned.
member.returns: The type name to use.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.CodeGenerationTools.GetTypeName(System.Data.Entity.Core.Metadata.Edm.EdmType,System.Nullable{System.Boolean},System.String)
member.summary: Returns the escaped type name to use for the given c-space type in o-space. This might be an external type name if the ExternalTypeName annotation has been specified in the conceptual model metadata (CSDL).
member.param: The c-space type to get a name for.
Set this to true for nullable usage of this type.
If not null and the type's namespace does not match this namespace, then a fully qualified name will be returned.

member.summary: This method returns the underlying CLR type of the o-space type corresponding to the supplied Note that for an enum type this means that the type backing the enum will be returned, not the enum type itself.

member.summary: Given a property on the dependent end of a referential constraint, returns the corresponding property on the principal end. Requires: The association has a referential constraint, and the specified dependentProperty is one of the properties on the dependent end.

member.summary: True if the specified association end is the principal in an identifying relationship. or if the association end has cascade delete defined.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.MetadataTools.IsIdentifyingRelationship(System.Data.Entity.Core.Metadata.Edm.AssociationType)
member.summary: True if the specified association type is an identifying relationship. In order to be an identifying relationship, the association must have a referential constraint where all of the dependent properties are part of the dependent type's primary key.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.MetadataTools.IsKey(System.Data.Entity.Core.Metadata.Edm.EdmProperty)
member.summary: True if the EdmProperty is a key of its DeclaringType, False otherwise.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.MetadataTools.IsPrincipalEndOfIdentifyingRelationship(System.Data.Entity.Core.Metadata.Edm.AssociationEndMember)
member.summary: True if the specified association end is the principal end in an identifying relationship. In order to be an identifying relationship, the association must have a referential constraint where all of the dependent properties are part of the dependent type's primary key.

member.summary: requires: firstType is not null effects: if secondType is among the base types of the firstType, return true, otherwise returns false. when firstType is same as the secondType, return false.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.MintlifyOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for Mintlify documentation generation.
member.remarks: This class contains all the configuration settings that control how the Mintlify documentation is generated, including output paths, filtering options, and formatting preferences.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.MintlifyOptions.OutputDirectory
member.summary: Gets or sets the output directory for generated documentation.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.MintlifyOptions.Verbose
member.summary: Gets or sets whether to enable verbose output during generation.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.MintlifyOptions.IncludeInternal
member.summary: Gets or sets whether to include internal members in the documentation.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.MintlifyOptions.NamespaceFilter
member.summary: Gets or sets the namespace filter regex pattern. Only namespaces matching this pattern will be included.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.MintlifyOptions.TypeFilter
member.summary: Gets or sets the type filter regex pattern. Only types matching this pattern will be included.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.MintlifyOptions.GenerateConfig
member.summary: Gets or sets whether to generate a docs.json configuration file.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.MintlifyOptions.ConfigOnly
member.summary: Gets or sets whether to only generate the docs.json file without MDX files.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.MintlifyOptions.Clean
member.summary: Gets or sets whether to clean the output directory before generating.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.MintlifyOptions.BaseUrl
member.summary: Gets or sets the base URL for cross-references to external documentation.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.MintlifyOptions.Theme
member.summary: Gets or sets the theme for the documentation site.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.MintlifyOptions.PrimaryColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the primary color for the documentation theme.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.MintlifyOptions.PrimaryDarkColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the primary color for dark mode.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.MintlifyOptions.SiteName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the documentation site.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.MintlifyOptions.SiteDescription
member.summary: Gets or sets the description of the documentation site.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.MintlifyOptions.IncludeExamples
member.summary: Gets or sets whether to include code examples in the generated documentation.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.MintlifyOptions.IncludeInheritance
member.summary: Gets or sets whether to include inheritance information.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.MintlifyOptions.IncludeSeeAlso
member.summary: Gets or sets whether to include see also references.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.MintlifyOptions.MaxDepth
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum depth for nested type documentation.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.MintlifyOptions.SolutionNamePrefix
member.summary: Gets or sets the solution name prefix to strip from project names when generating paths.
member.remarks: For example, if the solution is "CloudNimble.Breakdance" and projects are named "CloudNimble.Breakdance.AspNetCore", the output path will be "/aspnetcore/" instead of "/cloudnimble-breakdance-aspnetcore/".

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.MintlifyOptions.LogoLight
member.summary: Gets or sets the path to the light logo file.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.MintlifyOptions.LogoDark
member.summary: Gets or sets the path to the dark logo file.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.MintlifyOptions.LogoHref
member.summary: Gets or sets the URL to redirect to when clicking the logo.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.MintlifyOptions.FaviconLight
member.summary: Gets or sets the favicon path or light mode favicon.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.MintlifyOptions.FaviconDark
member.summary: Gets or sets the dark mode favicon path.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.MintlifyOptions.AppearanceDefault
member.summary: Gets or sets the default appearance mode (system, light, dark).

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.MintlifyOptions.AppearanceStrict
member.summary: Gets or sets whether to hide the light/dark mode toggle.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.MintlifyOptions.IconLibrary
member.summary: Gets or sets the icon library to use (fontawesome, lucide).

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.MintlifyOptions.GitHubUrl
member.summary: Gets or sets the GitHub URL for footer social links.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.MintlifyOptions.WebsiteUrl
member.summary: Gets or sets the website URL for footer social links.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.MintlifyOptions.SearchPrompt
member.summary: Gets or sets the search prompt text.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.MintlifyOptions.SeoIndexing
member.summary: Gets or sets the SEO indexing mode (navigable, all).

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.MintlifyOptions.PreserveExistingConfig
member.summary: Gets or sets whether to preserve existing docs.json configuration when updating.
member.remarks: When true (default), the generator will read any existing docs.json file and merge the generated API documentation with existing configuration, preserving custom navigation, styling, integrations, and other settings. When false, the generator will completely replace the docs.json file with new configuration.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.MintlifyOptions.Validate
member.summary: Validates the options and throws an exception if any are invalid.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.ApiConfig
member.summary: Represents the API reference configuration and playground settings for Mintlify.
member.remarks: This configuration controls how API documentation is displayed and how the API playground functions, including OpenAPI and AsyncAPI specifications.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.ApiConfig.AsyncApi
member.summary: Gets or sets the AsyncAPI specification configuration.
member.remarks: Can be a string URL, an array of URLs, or an object with source and directory properties pointing to AsyncAPI specification files.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.ApiConfig.OpenApi
member.summary: Gets or sets the OpenAPI specification configuration.
member.remarks: Can be a string URL, an array of URLs, or an object with source and directory properties pointing to OpenAPI specification files.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.AppearanceConfig
member.summary: Represents the appearance configuration for light and dark mode settings in Mintlify.
member.remarks: This configuration controls the default appearance mode and whether users can toggle between light and dark modes in the documentation site.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.AppearanceConfig.Default
member.summary: Gets or sets the default light/dark mode for the documentation site.
member.remarks: Valid values are "system" (follows user's system preference), "light", or "dark". Defaults to "system" if not specified.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.AppearanceConfig.Strict
member.summary: Gets or sets whether to hide the light/dark mode toggle from users.
member.remarks: When set to true, users will not be able to switch between light and dark modes, and the site will use only the default mode specified. Defaults to false.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.BackgroundConfig
member.summary: Represents the background configuration for the Mintlify documentation site.
member.remarks: This configuration controls the background appearance including images, decorations, and colors for the documentation site.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.BackgroundConfig.Color
member.summary: Gets or sets the background color configuration.
member.remarks: Can be a hex color string or an object with color configuration properties. This controls the base background color of the documentation site.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.BackgroundConfig.Decoration
member.summary: Gets or sets the background decoration style.
member.remarks: Valid values are "gradient", "grid", or "windows". This adds decorative background patterns to enhance the visual appearance of the site.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.BackgroundConfig.Image
member.summary: Gets or sets the background image configuration.
member.remarks: Can be a string URL for a single image, or an object with "light" and "dark" properties for different images in each mode. Should be an absolute URL or relative path to the image file.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.BannerConfig
member.summary: Represents the banner configuration for displaying announcements or notifications in the Mintlify documentation site.
member.remarks: This configuration allows you to display a banner at the top of your documentation for important announcements, updates, or notifications. The banner supports MDX formatting.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.BannerConfig.Content
member.summary: Gets or sets the content to display in the banner.
member.remarks: The text or MDX content that will be displayed in the banner. MDX formatting is supported, allowing for rich content including links, emphasis, and other formatting. This content should be concise but informative.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.BannerConfig.Dismissible
member.summary: Gets or sets whether to show a dismiss button on the banner.
member.remarks: When true, displays a dismiss button (X) on the right side of the banner, allowing users to close the banner. When false or not specified, the banner cannot be dismissed by users and will always be visible.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.ColorPairConfig
member.summary: Represents a color pair configuration for light and dark modes.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.ColorPairConfig.Dark
member.summary: Gets or sets the color in hex format to use in dark mode.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.ColorPairConfig.Light
member.summary: Gets or sets the color in hex format to use in light mode.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.ColorsConfig
member.summary: Represents the color configuration for Mintlify themes.
member.remarks: The colors to use in your documentation. At the very least, you must define the primary color.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.ColorsConfig.Dark
member.summary: Gets or sets the dark color of the theme in hex format. Used for light mode.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.ColorsConfig.Light
member.summary: Gets or sets the light color of the theme in hex format. Used for dark mode.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.ColorsConfig.Primary
member.summary: Gets or sets the primary color of the theme in hex format.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.ContextualConfig
member.summary: Represents the contextual options configuration for the Mintlify documentation site.
member.remarks: This configuration controls the contextual options that appear in the documentation, such as copy buttons, view source links, and AI assistant integrations.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.ContextualConfig.Options
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of contextual options to enable.
member.remarks: Valid options include: - "copy": Shows a copy button for code blocks and other copyable content - "view": Provides view source or view raw options for content - "chatgpt": Enables ChatGPT integration for AI assistance - "claude": Enables Claude AI integration for AI assistance These options enhance user interaction with the documentation content.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.DocsJsonConfig
member.summary: Represents the root configuration object for Mintlify docs.json.
member.remarks: This class represents the complete structure of a Mintlify docs.json configuration file as defined by the official Mintlify schema. It supports all themes and configuration options.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.Error404Config
member.summary: Represents the configuration for 404 (Not Found) error handling in the Mintlify documentation site.
member.remarks: This configuration controls what happens when users try to access pages that don't exist, including whether to automatically redirect them to the home page.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.Error404Config.Redirect
member.summary: Gets or sets whether to automatically redirect users to the home page when a 404 error occurs.
member.remarks: When true (default), users who navigate to non-existent pages will be automatically redirected to the home page of the documentation site. When false, users will see a standard 404 error page instead. Automatic redirection can improve user experience by keeping users within the documentation rather than showing error pages.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.ErrorsConfig
member.summary: Represents the error pages configuration for the Mintlify documentation site.
member.remarks: This configuration controls how various error conditions are handled, including 404 (Not Found) errors and their behavior.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.ErrorsConfig.NotFound
member.summary: Gets or sets the configuration for 404 (Not Found) error handling.
member.remarks: Defines how the site behaves when users attempt to access pages that don't exist. This includes options for automatic redirection and custom error page behavior.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.FaviconConfig
member.summary: Represents the favicon configuration for Mintlify. Can be a single file or separate files for light and dark mode.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.FaviconConfig.Dark
member.summary: Gets or sets the path to the dark favicon file, including the file extension.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.FaviconConfig.Light
member.summary: Gets or sets the path to the light favicon file, including the file extension.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.FontsConfig
member.summary: Represents the font configuration for the Mintlify documentation site.
member.remarks: This configuration allows customization of typography by specifying custom fonts including font family, weight, source URLs, and format specifications.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.FontsConfig.Family
member.summary: Gets or sets the font family name.
member.remarks: Specifies the name of the font family to use, such as "Open Sans" or "Playfair Display". This should match the font family name defined in the font file.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.FontsConfig.Format
member.summary: Gets or sets the font file format.
member.remarks: Specifies the format of the font file. Valid values are "woff" or "woff2". WOFF2 is preferred for modern browsers as it provides better compression.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.FontsConfig.Source
member.summary: Gets or sets the font source URL.
member.remarks: Specifies the URL where the font file can be downloaded from. Should be a complete URL pointing to the font file, such as "https://mintlify-assets.b-cdn.net/fonts/Hubot-Sans.woff2".

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.FontsConfig.Weight
member.summary: Gets or sets the font weight.
member.remarks: Specifies the font weight as a numeric value such as 400 (normal) or 700 (bold). Precise font weights like 550 are supported for variable fonts. Common values include 300 (light), 400 (normal), 500 (medium), 600 (semi-bold), 700 (bold).

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.FooterConfig
member.summary: Represents the footer configuration for Mintlify.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.FooterConfig.Links
member.summary: Gets or sets the footer links.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.FooterConfig.Socials
member.summary: Gets or sets the social media links.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.FooterLinkGroup
member.summary: Represents a group of footer links.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.FooterLinkGroup.Header
member.summary: Gets or sets the header title of the column.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.FooterLinkGroup.Items
member.summary: Gets or sets the items in the footer group.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.FooterLink
member.summary: Represents a footer link.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.FooterLink.Href
member.summary: Gets or sets the URL of the link.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.FooterLink.Label
member.summary: Gets or sets the label of the link.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.GlobalAnchorConfig
member.summary: Represents an anchor configuration for global navigation in the Mintlify documentation site.
member.remarks: This configuration defines an anchor link that appears globally across all sections and pages, providing users with quick access to important external resources or key pages.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.GlobalAnchorConfig.Anchor
member.summary: Gets or sets the display name for the anchor link.
member.remarks: Specifies the text that will be shown for the anchor link. Should be concise and descriptive of the link's destination, such as "GitHub", "API Status", "Support", etc.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.GlobalAnchorConfig.Color
member.summary: Gets or sets the color configuration for the anchor.
member.remarks: Defines custom colors for the anchor link in light and dark modes. This allows the anchor to have distinctive styling that matches your brand or indicates different types of external resources.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.GlobalAnchorConfig.Hidden
member.summary: Gets or sets whether this anchor is hidden by default.
member.remarks: When true, this anchor will not be visible in the global navigation unless specifically shown. This can be useful for anchors that are temporary or not ready for public access.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.GlobalAnchorConfig.Href
member.summary: Gets or sets the URL or path for this anchor link.
member.remarks: Specifies where users should be directed when they click on this anchor. Can be a relative path within the documentation or an absolute URL for external resources such as GitHub repositories, status pages, or support portals.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.GlobalAnchorConfig.Icon
member.summary: Gets or sets the icon to display alongside the anchor name.
member.remarks: Can be a string icon name from the configured icon library, or an object with detailed icon configuration including style and library properties. The icon appears before the anchor text to provide visual context.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.GlobalDropdownConfig
member.summary: Represents a dropdown configuration for global navigation in the Mintlify documentation site.
member.remarks: This configuration defines a dropdown menu that appears globally across all sections and pages, providing users with organized access to multiple related links or sections.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.GlobalDropdownConfig.Dropdown
member.summary: Gets or sets the display name for the dropdown button.
member.remarks: Specifies the text that will be shown on the dropdown button. Should be concise and descriptive of the dropdown's contents, such as "Resources", "Tools", "Community", etc.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.GlobalDropdownConfig.Icon
member.summary: Gets or sets the icon to display alongside the dropdown name.
member.remarks: Can be a string icon name from the configured icon library, or an object with detailed icon configuration including style and library properties. The icon appears before the dropdown text to provide visual context.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.GlobalDropdownConfig.Color
member.summary: Gets or sets the color configuration for the dropdown.
member.remarks: Defines custom colors for the dropdown in light and dark modes. This allows the dropdown to have distinctive styling that matches your brand or indicates different types of content.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.GlobalDropdownConfig.Description
member.summary: Gets or sets the description text for the dropdown.
member.remarks: Optional descriptive text that can appear in the dropdown or as a tooltip. Provides additional context about what users will find in the dropdown menu.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.GlobalDropdownConfig.Hidden
member.summary: Gets or sets whether this dropdown is hidden by default.
member.remarks: When true, this dropdown will not be visible in the global navigation unless specifically shown. This can be useful for dropdowns that are in development or not ready for public access.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.GlobalDropdownConfig.Href
member.summary: Gets or sets the primary URL or path for this dropdown.
member.remarks: Specifies where users should be directed when they click directly on the dropdown button (rather than selecting a specific item). Can be a relative path or absolute URL. This is optional if the dropdown only contains sub-items.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.GlobalLanguageConfig
member.summary: Represents a language configuration for global navigation in the Mintlify documentation site.
member.remarks: This configuration defines a language option that appears globally across all sections and pages, allowing users to switch between different language versions of the documentation.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.GlobalLanguageConfig.Language
member.summary: Gets or sets the language code in ISO 639-1 format.
member.remarks: Specifies the language using a standard two-letter code such as "en" for English, "es" for Spanish, "fr" for French, etc. Extended codes like "zh-Hans" for Simplified Chinese or "fr-CA" for Canadian French are also supported.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.GlobalLanguageConfig.Default
member.summary: Gets or sets whether this language is the default language for the documentation.
member.remarks: When true, this language will be selected by default when users first visit the documentation. Only one language should be marked as default.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.GlobalLanguageConfig.Hidden
member.summary: Gets or sets whether this language option is hidden by default.
member.remarks: When true, this language option will not be visible in the language selector unless specifically shown. This can be useful for languages that are in development or not ready for public access.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.GlobalLanguageConfig.Href
member.summary: Gets or sets the URL or path for this language version.
member.remarks: Specifies where users should be directed when they select this language. Can be a relative path (e.g., "/es/") or an absolute URL for a different domain (e.g., "https://es.example.com/").

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.GlobalNavigationConfig
member.summary: Represents global navigation configuration that appears on all sections and pages.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.GlobalNavigationConfig.Anchors
member.summary: Gets or sets the anchors configuration.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.GlobalNavigationConfig.Dropdowns
member.summary: Gets or sets the dropdowns configuration.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.GlobalNavigationConfig.Languages
member.summary: Gets or sets the languages configuration.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.GlobalNavigationConfig.Tabs
member.summary: Gets or sets the tabs configuration.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.GlobalNavigationConfig.Versions
member.summary: Gets or sets the versions configuration.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.GlobalTabConfig
member.summary: Represents a tab configuration for global navigation in the Mintlify documentation site.
member.remarks: This configuration defines a tab that appears globally across all sections and pages, providing users with quick access to different areas or types of documentation.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.GlobalTabConfig.Tab
member.summary: Gets or sets the display name for the tab.
member.remarks: Specifies the text that will be shown on the tab button. Should be concise and descriptive of the tab's content or purpose, such as "API Reference", "Guides", "Examples", etc.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.GlobalTabConfig.Icon
member.summary: Gets or sets the icon to display alongside the tab name.
member.remarks: Can be a string icon name from the configured icon library, or an object with detailed icon configuration including style and library properties. The icon appears before or alongside the tab text to provide visual context.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.GlobalTabConfig.Hidden
member.summary: Gets or sets whether this tab is hidden by default.
member.remarks: When true, this tab will not be visible in the global navigation unless specifically shown. This can be useful for tabs that are in development or not ready for public access.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.GlobalTabConfig.Href
member.summary: Gets or sets the URL or path for this tab.
member.remarks: Specifies where users should be directed when they click on this tab. Can be a relative path (e.g., "/api/") or an absolute URL for external content. This determines the landing page for the tab.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.GlobalVersionConfig
member.summary: Represents a version configuration for global navigation in the Mintlify documentation site.
member.remarks: This configuration defines a version option that appears globally across all sections and pages, allowing users to switch between different versions of the documentation.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.GlobalVersionConfig.Version
member.summary: Gets or sets the version identifier or name.
member.remarks: Specifies the version name that will be displayed to users, such as "v1.0", "v2.0", "latest", "beta", or any descriptive version label. This should be concise and meaningful to your users.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.GlobalVersionConfig.Default
member.summary: Gets or sets whether this version is the default version for the documentation.
member.remarks: When true, this version will be selected by default when users first visit the documentation. Only one version should be marked as default.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.GlobalVersionConfig.Hidden
member.summary: Gets or sets whether this version option is hidden by default.
member.remarks: When true, this version option will not be visible in the version selector unless specifically shown. This can be useful for versions that are deprecated, in development, or not ready for public access.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.GlobalVersionConfig.Href
member.summary: Gets or sets the URL or path for this version of the documentation.
member.remarks: Specifies where users should be directed when they select this version. Can be a relative path (e.g., "/v2/") or an absolute URL for a different domain (e.g., "https://v2.docs.example.com/").

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.GroupConfig
member.summary: Represents a group configuration in Mintlify navigation.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.IconsConfig
member.summary: Represents the icon library configuration for the Mintlify documentation site.
member.remarks: This configuration determines which icon library is used throughout the documentation for displaying icons in navigation, buttons, and other UI elements.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.IconsConfig.Library
member.summary: Gets or sets the icon library to be used throughout the documentation.
member.remarks: Valid values are "fontawesome" or "lucide". The selected library determines which icon names are available for use in navigation items, buttons, and other UI components. FontAwesome provides a comprehensive set of icons, while Lucide offers a more minimal, modern icon set. Defaults to "fontawesome".

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.IntegrationsConfig
member.summary: Represents the integrations configuration for third-party services in the Mintlify documentation site.
member.remarks: This configuration enables integration with various analytics, feedback, and other third-party services. Each integration has specific configuration requirements that can be added as properties. Common integrations include Google Analytics, Amplitude, Intercom, Hotjar, and others.

member.summary: Gets or sets whether this language is the default language.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.LanguageConfig.Global

member.summary: Represents the logo configuration for Mintlify. Can be a single image path for both light and dark mode, or separate paths for each mode.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.LogoConfig.Dark
member.summary: Gets or sets the path to the dark logo file, including the file extension.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.LogoConfig.Href
member.summary: Gets or sets the URL to redirect to when clicking the logo. If not provided, the logo will link to the homepage.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.LogoConfig.Light

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.NavbarConfig
member.summary: Represents the navigation bar configuration for the Mintlify documentation site.
member.remarks: This configuration controls the content and appearance of the top navigation bar, including custom links and primary call-to-action buttons.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.NavbarConfig.Links
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of navigation links to display in the navbar.
member.remarks: Each link should have a label, optional icon, and href pointing to the destination. These links appear in the top navigation bar of the documentation site.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.NavbarConfig.Primary
member.summary: Gets or sets the primary call-to-action configuration in the navbar.
member.remarks: Can be a button configuration with type "button", label, and href properties, or a GitHub configuration with type "github" and href properties. This appears prominently in the navbar to drive user actions.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.NavbarLink
member.summary: Represents a navigation link in the Mintlify navbar.
member.remarks: Each navbar link consists of a label, optional icon, and destination URL. These links provide quick access to important pages or external resources.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.NavbarLink.Href
member.summary: Gets or sets the destination URL for the navigation link.
member.remarks: Can be an absolute URL (https://example.com) or a relative path (/docs/page). This determines where users navigate when clicking the link.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.NavbarLink.Icon
member.summary: Gets or sets the icon to display alongside the navigation link.
member.remarks: Can be a string icon name from the configured icon library, or an object with detailed icon configuration including style and library properties. The icon appears before the label text.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.NavbarLink.Label
member.summary: Gets or sets the display text for the navigation link.
member.remarks: This text appears in the navbar and should be concise and descriptive of the link's destination.

member.summary: Represents the navigation configuration for Mintlify.

member.summary: Gets or sets the anchors in the navigation.

member.summary: Gets or sets the dropdowns in the navigation.

member.summary: Gets or sets global navigation items that appear on all sections and pages.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.NavigationConfig.Groups
member.summary: Gets or sets the groups in the navigation.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.NavigationConfig.Languages
member.summary: Gets or sets the languages in the navigation.

member.summary: Gets or sets the pages in the navigation.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.NavigationConfig.Tabs
member.summary: Gets or sets the tabs in the navigation.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.NavigationConfig.Versions
member.summary: Gets or sets the versions in the navigation.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.RedirectConfig
member.summary: Represents a URL redirect configuration for the Mintlify documentation site.
member.remarks: This configuration defines how requests to specific paths should be redirected to different URLs, useful for maintaining backward compatibility or reorganizing content.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.RedirectConfig.Destination
member.summary: Gets or sets the destination path where requests should be redirected.
member.remarks: Specifies where users should be redirected when they visit the source path. Can be a relative path (e.g., "/new-page") or an absolute URL (e.g., "https://example.com/page").

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.RedirectConfig.Permanent
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the redirect is permanent (301) or temporary (302).
member.remarks: When true, returns a 301 (Moved Permanently) status code, indicating to search engines that the move is permanent. When false or not specified, returns a 302 (Found) status code for temporary redirects. Permanent redirects are better for SEO when content has permanently moved.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.RedirectConfig.Source
member.summary: Gets or sets the source path that should be redirected.
member.remarks: Specifies the original path that users might visit. When a request is made to this path, it will be automatically redirected to the destination. Should be a relative path starting with "/" (e.g., "/old-page").

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.SearchConfig
member.summary: Represents the search functionality configuration for the Mintlify documentation site.
member.remarks: This configuration controls the appearance and behavior of the search feature, including placeholder text and search display settings.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.SearchConfig.Prompt
member.summary: Gets or sets the placeholder text displayed in the search input field.
member.remarks: This text appears in the search bar when it's empty, providing guidance to users about what they can search for. Should be concise and helpful.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.SeoConfig
member.summary: Represents the SEO (Search Engine Optimization) configuration for the Mintlify documentation site.
member.remarks: This configuration controls how search engines index and display the documentation, including meta tags and indexing behavior.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.SeoConfig.Indexing
member.summary: Gets or sets which pages should be indexed by search engines.
member.remarks: Valid values are "navigable" (only pages in navigation) or "all" (all pages). The "navigable" setting indexes only pages that appear in the site navigation, while "all" indexes every page in the documentation. Defaults to "navigable".

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.SeoConfig.Metatags
member.summary: Gets or sets custom meta tags to be added to every page.
member.remarks: Each key-value pair represents a meta tag name and its content. These tags are included in the HTML head section of all pages to provide additional information to search engines.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.SimpleNavigation
member.summary: Represents a simple navigation structure that contains only pages. This is used for the most common case where navigation is just a list of pages.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.SimpleNavigation.Pages
member.summary: Gets or sets the pages in the navigation.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.StylingConfig
member.summary: Represents the styling configuration for various UI elements in the Mintlify documentation site.
member.remarks: This configuration controls the visual styling of specific components such as breadcrumbs, section eyebrows, and code blocks throughout the documentation.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.StylingConfig.Codeblocks
member.summary: Gets or sets the code block theme.
member.remarks: Valid values are "system" or "dark". The "system" option uses a theme that matches the current light/dark mode, while "dark" always uses a dark theme for code blocks regardless of the site's appearance mode. Defaults to "system".

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.Models.StylingConfig.Eyebrows
member.summary: Gets or sets the eyebrows style for content sections.
member.remarks: Valid values are "section" or "breadcrumbs". This controls the style of the small text that appears above page titles and section headers. "section" shows the current section name, while "breadcrumbs" shows the full navigation path. Defaults to "section".

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.XmlDocumentationProcessor
member.summary: Processes XML documentation elements and applies link resolution.
member.remarks: This class provides a centralized way to process XML documentation elements and apply cross-reference link resolution using the MintlifyLinkResolver. It acts as a bridge between the parsed XML elements and the final MDX output.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.XmlDocumentationProcessor.ProcessElement(CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlDocumentationElement,CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.MintlifyLinkResolver)
member.summary: Processes an XML documentation element and resolves any cross-references.
member.param: The documentation element to process.
The link resolver to use for cross-references.
member.returns: The processed MDX content with resolved links.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.XmlDocumentationProcessor.ProcessSeeElement(CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlSeeElement,CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.MintlifyLinkResolver)
member.summary: Processes an XML documentation element specifically for see references.
member.param: The see element to process.
The link resolver to use.
member.returns: The processed link in MDX format.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.XmlDocumentationProcessor.ProcessSeeAlsoElement(CloudNimble.EasyAF.XmlDocumentation.XmlSeeAlsoElement,CloudNimble.EasyAF.CodeGen.Mintlify.MintlifyLinkResolver)
member.summary: Processes an XML documentation element specifically for see also references.
member.param: The see also element to process.
The link resolver to use.
member.returns: The processed link in MDX format.
